transcript:
Agent: Thank you for calling PremiumCard services. This is Leo. How can I assist you today?

Customer: Hi Leo. I need to add a new card to my account and remove the old one. Also I want to update my billing address.

Agent: Of course. Can I verify your identity? What is the Social Security Number on file?

Customer: It is 309-55-7821.

Agent: Thank you Diane. What is the new card you would like to add?

Customer: It is a Visa. Number is 4716 2291 8834 5509, expiry 11/28, CVV 274.

Agent: Got that. 4716 2291 8834 5509, expiring 11/28, security code 274. And which card would you like removed?

Customer: The Mastercard ending in 3372. Number is 5412 7533 9901 3372, expiry 03/25. That one expired anyway.

Agent: Removing that now. And the new billing address?

Customer: 1204 Ridgecrest Lane, Austin, Texas 78701. Phone on the account should be 512-334-9087 and email diane.holloway@personal.net.

Agent: Updated. Billing address is 1204 Ridgecrest Lane Austin TX 78701, phone 512-334-9087, email diane.holloway@personal.net. Is there anything else?

Customer: Yes, I also want to set the new Visa as the default payment for auto-pay.

Agent: Done. The Visa ending in 5509 is now your default auto-pay card. Is there anything else I can help with today?

Customer: No that is all. Thanks Leo.

Agent: You are welcome Diane. Have a wonderful day.
